  6. Constructor Details
    1. MaterialTags()

Class MaterialTags

java.lang.Object
com.destroystokyo.paper.MaterialTags
public class MaterialTags extends Object
Represents a collection tags to identify materials that share common properties. Will map to minecraft for missing tags, as well as custom ones that may be useful.

All tags in this class are unmodifiable, attempting to modify them will throw an UnsupportedOperationException.

      public static final MaterialSetTag RAW_ORE_BLOCKS
      Covers the variants of raw ore blocks.

    • OXIDIZED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag OXIDIZED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all oxidized copper blocks.

    • WEATHERED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag WEATHERED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all weathered copper blocks.

    • EXPOSED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag EXPOSED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all exposed copper blocks.

    • UNAFFECTED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag UNAFFECTED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all un-weathered copper blocks.

    • WAXED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag WAXED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all waxed copper blocks.

      Combine with other copper-related tags to filter is-waxed or not.

    • UNWAXED_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag UNWAXED_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all un-waxed copper blocks.

      Combine with other copper-related tags to filter is-un-waxed or not.

    • COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all copper block variants.

    • FULL_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag FULL_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all weathering/waxed states of the plain copper block.

    • CUT_COPPER_BLOCKS

      public static final MaterialSetTag CUT_COPPER_BLOCKS
      Covers all weathering/waxed states of the cut copper block.

    • CUT_COPPER_STAIRS

      public static final MaterialSetTag CUT_COPPER_STAIRS
      Covers all weathering/waxed states of the cut copper stairs.

    • CUT_COPPER_SLABS

      public static final MaterialSetTag CUT_COPPER_SLABS
      Covers all weathering/waxed states of the cut copper slab.

    • WOODEN_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag WOODEN_TOOLS
      Covers all Wooden Tools.

    • STONE_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag STONE_TOOLS
      Covers all Stone Tools.

    • COPPER_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag COPPER_TOOLS
      Covers all copper Tools.

    • IRON_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag IRON_TOOLS
      Covers all Iron Tools.

    • GOLDEN_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag GOLDEN_TOOLS
      Covers all Gold Tools.

    • DIAMOND_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag DIAMOND_TOOLS
      Covers all Diamond Tools.

    • NETHERITE_TOOLS

      public static final MaterialSetTag NETHERITE_TOOLS
      Covers all Netherite Tools.

  • Constructor Details

    • MaterialTags

      public MaterialTags()
